content: Mars has two small, irregularly shaped moons named Phobos and Deimos. These moons were discovered in 1877 by American astronomer Asaph Hall and are believed to be captured asteroids.
raw_content: Mars has two small, irregularly shaped moons named Phobos and Deimos. These moons were discovered in 1877 by American astronomer Asaph Hall and are believed to be captured asteroids.
